lines: Spain did what they needed to do, beating Belgium 2–1 in the quarters — Jim's sitting 4th on 71pts and his one remaining team just keeps fucking marching on while Morocco, Sweden and Qatar all died in a ditch. Painful, mate. Genuinely painful.

Today's Norway vs England quarter-final is an absolute clusterfuck of sweepstake chaos — Norway is owned by FIVE of you cunts (Al, Butters, Callum, Croft, AND Wilmot), while Carter and Wilmot both hold England. Wilmot, you absolute helmet, you've somehow managed to own BOTH teams in this fixture, which means you're guaranteed some points but also means you've somehow made supporting your own country feel like a fucking accounting exercise.

Wilmot sits 3rd on 75pts and has the audacity to still be relevant despite the fact that Morocco and Saudi Arabia turned to absolute dust in his hands — the man's leaning entirely on Norway and England to carry him like the dead weight he is. The fact that he needs a spreadsheet to work out who to cheer for today tells you everything about what a useless fucking participant he's been.

Ellis is sitting joint last on 46pts with Argentina as her only surviving team — Argentina vs Switzerland today is basically her entire tournament, and frankly it's the most predictable story of this sweepstake: one fuck clinging on by a single thread while South Korea, Paraguay and New Zealand already packed their bags and fucked off home.
Watch today's Norway vs England — if Norway go through, Callum on 87pts essentially disappears into the distance and the rest of you sorry twats can start making peace with losing.
